PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Kane Gary Kane.

Mr. Kane stated that Ms. Ross was a long-term Client, that the last codicil asked that his Brother be appointed, that he searched the safe deposit box and found the original will and some of the codicils, and that he also searched the home. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
